title: HGL MICRO FIDGETZ Fidget Toy - Mini Fidget Fun with Five Toys in Each Pod
features: Micro Fidgetz, possibly the ultimate in fidget fun. An assortment of the best in micro fidget toys. Each pod comes with 5 items inside, each a miniature version of classic fidget toys.

All are designed to occupy fidgeting fingers with something that is hard to put down, a gratifying tactile experience that is anti-stress, therapeutic and oddly satisfying. Release restless energy, find focus, mindfulness and increased concentration.
Engaging and engrossing, fascinating and fun, these fabulous fidgets are sized for portability and use on the go. They’ll fit great in school bags, backpacks, purses or pockets.

It’s a great assortment that includes spinners, squshies, soft noodles, popper, springs and other manipulatives. Collect them all. Micro Fidgets pods are shipped randomly so there is always a surprise.

Give as party favors, stocking stuffers, goodie bags, Easter baskets, or classroom prizes. All are completely non-toxic and meet and exceed all UK and EU product safety standards. A great gift for boys a and girls ages 3+
description: Product Description Unleash the magic of play with Tobar Toys, where imagination knows no bounds and adventure awaits around every corner. Tobar has been a trusted name in the world of toys, captivating hearts and minds with an extraordinary range of playthings that promise joy, creativity, and wonder for children of all ages. Toys that have stood the test of time and built to last through countless hours of entertainment. From classic retro to cutting-edge innovation there’s a Tobar toy for every age, interest and desire. All designed to ignite the flames of imagination. With their captivating designs, vivid colors, and unique features, they transport children to a world of endless possibilities, where creativity knows no bounds. Not just for play; they're also tools for learning, Tobar encourages curious minds to explore and discover the wonders of the world. Tobar believes in the power of play to bring families together. Their games and activities are perfect for creating memorable bonding moments, making every day a new adventure. Discover the enchanting world of Tobar, where joy, laughter, and exploration are at the forefront. Tobar empowers you to find the perfect toy to nurture the creativity, curiosity, and playfulness in your child. Elevate playtime to a whole new level and experience the magic of extraordinary toys. For almost 50 years we have offered high-quality, innovative and safe products that engage and enthrall children and adults alike. We strive to promote creativity, discovery, entertainment and imagination with products designed to delight and engineered to endure. From Impulse to Games, Plush to Outdoor, Figurines to Playsets. Along with Tobar products, One For Fun offers HGL toys, OzBozz Ride-ons and Bburago Race Cars and Maisto Collectible Diecast. Safety Warning Small Parts
